description: God View dashboard providing a single pane of glass for the entire LGTM (Loki, Grafana, Tempo, Mimir) + Pyroscope observability platform across multiple clusters and stacks.

panels.title: Total Components Up
panels.description: Percentage of all monitored components that are currently reporting UP. A value below 99% warrants investigation; below 90% indicates a significant outage.

targets.expr: sum(up{cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}) / count(up{cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}) * 100

panels.title: Grafana Instances
panels.description: Number of running Grafana instances detected across all selected clusters and stacks.

panels.title: Mimir Instances
panels.description: Number of running Mimir (Cortex) instances detected across all selected clusters and stacks.

panels.title: Loki Instances
panels.description: Number of running Loki instances detected across all selected clusters and stacks.

panels.title: Tempo Instances
panels.description: Number of running Tempo instances detected across all selected clusters and stacks.

panels.title: Pyroscope Instances
panels.description: Number of running Pyroscope instances detected across all selected clusters and stacks.

panels.title: Mimir Write Throughput
panels.description: Rate of write (push) requests hitting the Mimir distributor per cluster. A sudden drop may indicate upstream pipeline issues; a spike could signal a noisy tenant or misconfigured scrape.

panels.title: Loki Write Throughput
panels.description: Bytes per second received by the Loki distributor per cluster. Measures the total log ingestion volume across all tenants.

panels.title: Tempo Spans Received
panels.description: Rate of trace spans received by the Tempo distributor per cluster. Reflects tracing pipeline throughput.

panels.title: Mimir Query Latency P99
panels.description: 99th percentile latency of Mimir query-path requests by cluster. High values indicate slow queries that may be impacting user experience or SLOs.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (cluster, le) (rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_bucket{route=~"api_prom_api_v1_query|api_prom_api_v1_query_range|api_v1_query|api_v1_query_range", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: Loki Query Latency P99
panels.description: 99th percentile latency of Loki query-path requests by cluster. Monitors the tail-end performance of log queries.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (cluster, le) (rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_bucket{route=~"loki_api_v1_query|loki_api_v1_query_range|api_prom_query|api_prom_query_range", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: Tempo Query Latency P99
panels.description: 99th percentile latency of Tempo query-path requests by cluster. Tracks how fast trace lookups and search operations are completing.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (cluster, le) (rate(tempo_request_duration_seconds_bucket{route=~"tempo_api_v1_traces|tempo_api_v2_search|api_traces_traceid", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: Mimir Error Rate
panels.description: Percentage of Mimir requests returning 5xx status codes per cluster. Non-zero values indicate server-side failures that need attention.

targets.expr: sum by (cluster) (rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_count{status_code=~"5..", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum by (cluster) (rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_count{cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[$__rate_interval])) * 100

panels.title: Loki Error Rate
panels.description: Percentage of Loki requests returning 5xx status codes per cluster. Monitors log pipeline reliability.

targets.expr: sum by (cluster) (rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_count{status_code=~"5..", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum by (cluster) (rate(loki_request_duration_seconds_count{cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[$__rate_interval])) * 100

panels.title: Tempo Error Rate
panels.description: Percentage of Tempo requests returning 5xx status codes per cluster. Monitors tracing pipeline reliability.

targets.expr: sum by (cluster) (rate(tempo_request_duration_seconds_count{status_code=~"5..", cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum by (cluster) (rate(tempo_request_duration_seconds_count{cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace"}[$__rate_interval])) * 100

panels.title: CPU Usage by Component
panels.description: Total CPU usage (cores) aggregated by container name for LGTM stack components. Helps identify resource-hungry components and capacity planning needs.

panels.title: Memory Usage by Component
panels.description: Working set memory usage aggregated by container name for LGTM stack components. Tracks actual memory consumption to detect leaks and inform resource limits.

panels.title: Object Store Operations/s
panels.description: Rate of object store (S3/GCS/Azure) operations broken down by operation type. Helps monitor backend storage activity and identify unusual access patterns.

panels.title: Object Store Failures/s
panels.description: Rate of failed object store operations broken down by operation type. Any sustained failures indicate storage backend issues that will affect data durability and query availability.

panels.title: Active Series by Cluster
panels.description: Total number of active (in-memory) series per cluster in Mimir ingesters. This is the primary cardinality metric and directly impacts memory usage and cost.

panels.title: Log Volume by Cluster
panels.description: Current rate of log bytes received per cluster (5m average). Compares log ingestion volume across clusters to identify imbalances or unexpected spikes.

title: LGTM Stack Health — Multi-Cluster Overview
